name: Rye Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the dry ingredients and mix with 1-1/4 cups of water. Let the batter stand for a few minutes.
2. Spray a non-stick skillet lightly with cooking spray and rub it around to distribute evenly over the pan surface.
3. Heat the skillet over medium flame.
4. Stir the batter, which will have a course texture from the rye flour but should pour easily like a medium-thick pancake batter. If needed, add more water, 1-2 tablespoons at a time, until it is thin enough to pour.
5. Spoon about 2 or 3 tablespoons of batter into the pan. You should be able to fit three or four pancakes in the pan at a time.
6. As the cakes cook, bubbles will rise to the surface. When the tops are full of bubbles and have begun to set, flip the cakes and cover the pan.
7. Cook for 4 to 5 more minutes, until the cakes are dry inside. Remove the cakes to a plate and repeat with remaining batter.
